negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. name: misc_3012470-uhd_3840_2160_30fps
prompt: The video opens with a close-up shot of a young fox cub nestled on a bed of straw, situated in what appears to be an indoor enclosure. The cub, with its light brown fur and prominent pointed ears, is lying on its side and is engaged in eating a small piece of carrot. The straw is interspersed with bits of hay and a few colorful items, including a blue plush toy and a yellow object, suggesting a playful and comfortable environment. The cub's movements are minimal, primarily involving slight head movements as it chews on the carrot. The lighting is soft and natural, highlighting the cub's fur and the texture of the straw. As the video progresses, there are no significant changes in the cub's position or the introduction of new objects. The final frame continues to show the cub in the same relaxed posture, maintaining its focus on the carrot, with the surrounding straw and toys remaining static.  A close-up shot of a relaxed fox cub eating a carrot amidst straw and toys.
